message:
Merge PR #2188: fix(refinery): remove dead findTownRoot filesystem inference (ZFC gt-qago)

Remove filesystem-based town root inference. Town root is passed from
Start() as filepath.Dir(rig.Path), no need for re-inference.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2188
Author: DreadPirateRobertz
Co-authored-by: deckard <cdeal@mines.edu>

files.patch:
@@ -557,3 +557,6 @@ Please review the feedback and address the issues before resubmitting.`,
 		log.Printf("warning: notifying worker of rejection for %s: %v", mr.IssueID, err)
 	}
 }
+
+// Town root is computed in Start() as filepath.Dir(m.rig.Path) and passed
+// through to callers — no filesystem-inference function needed (ZFC gt-qago).
